calculus-volume-2:c1s1.reason: Area approximation continues Calc 1 Riemann-sum ideas.

calculus-volume-2:c1s2.reason: Definite integrals continue Calc 1 integral definition.

calculus-volume-2:c1s4.reason: Integration formulas and net change continue Calc 1.

calculus-volume-2:c1s6.reason: Exp/log integrals continue Calc 1 exp/log integration.

calculus-volume-2:c2s1.reason: Area between curves continues Calc 1 applications.

calculus-volume-2:c2s3.reason: Shell method continues Calc 1 volume techniques.

calculus-volume-2:c2s6.reason: Centers of mass continue physical applications.

calculus-volume-2:c2s7.reason: Integral definitions of ln/e continue Calc 1.

calculus-volume-2:c2s9.reason: Hyperbolic calculus continues Calc 1 hyperbolic functions.

calculus-volume-2:c3s1.reason: Integration by parts needs substitution fluency and product-rule intuition.

calculus-volume-2:c3s2.reason: Trig integrals need trig functions and substitution.

calculus-volume-2:c3s3.reason: Trig substitution uses trig identities and integrals.

calculus-volume-2:c3s4.reason: Partial-fraction integrals need algebraic partial fractions.

calculus-volume-2:c3s5.reason: Other strategies choose among parts, trig, and partial fractions.

calculus-volume-2:c3s7.reason: Improper integrals need FTC and limits at infinity.

calculus-volume-2:c4s1.reason: Differential equations relate derivatives to functions.

calculus-volume-2:c4s3.reason: Separable equations solve DEs by integration/substitution.

calculus-volume-2:c4s4.reason: Logistic equation specializes separable growth models.

calculus-volume-2:c4s5.reason: First-order linear DEs extend separable techniques.

calculus-volume-2:c5s1.reason: Sequences need precalc sequences and limit language.

calculus-volume-2:c5s2.reason: Infinite series are limits of sequence partial sums.

calculus-volume-2:c5s3.reason: Integral test connects series to improper integrals.

calculus-volume-2:c5s4.reason: Comparison tests use series convergence concepts.

calculus-volume-2:c5s5.reason: Alternating series are a special series test family.

calculus-volume-2:c5s6.reason: Ratio/root tests are further series tests.

calculus-volume-2:c6s1.reason: Power series are series of functions needing convergence tests.

calculus-volume-2:c6s2.reason: Power-series properties build on power-series definition.

calculus-volume-2:c6s3.reason: Taylor series use derivatives and power series.

calculus-volume-2:c6s4.reason: Working with Taylor series applies Taylor expansions.

calculus-volume-2:c7s1.reason: Parametric equations continue precalc parametrics with calculus readiness.

calculus-volume-2:c7s3.reason: Polar coordinates continue precalc polar with trig.

calculus-volume-2:c7s4.reason: Polar area/arc length integrate in polar coordinates.

calculus-volume-2:c7s5.reason: Polar conics continue precalc polar conic sections.
